goal: Implement local MCP connection status and tools list display in the plugin UI.
non_goals: Do not implement full MCP resources/prompts workflows in this task.
Do not execute high-risk tools from the UI without the permission contract.
Do not hardcode private local paths.
acceptance_criteria: UI displays MCP status: disconnected, connecting, connected, error.
UI displays configured Server URI and transport.
UI can refresh and display tools list.
Empty tools, schema errors, and connection failures have clear Chinese messages.
MCP client code is isolated from UI components.
